title: schisandra propinqua subsp. sinensis
intro: Schisandra propinqua subsp. sinensis, also known as Wu Wei Zi or Schisandra sinensis, is a type of adaptogenic plant that belongs to the Schisandraceae family. It is a traditional Chinese medicinal herb that has been used for centuries to promote overall health and well-being, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Schisandra propinqua subsp. sinensis include improved cognitive function, enhanced endurance and vitality, and protection against oxidative stress and cell damage, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Schisandra propinqua subsp. sinensis include dried fruits, tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function, reduce fatigue, and promote longevity.
